message: Rex here. Holding the grey sweater for now — not seeing a straight swap that values it right. Fair trades only.
Howdy pardners. Got me a fine Blue Top up for swap — see set_02_bo_tops_01. Reckon I'm lookin' to trade for some bottoms or outerwear. Holler if ya got somethin' worth talkin' about.
Still watching. Sweater’s solid; I’m not swapping it sideways for the wrong category.
Hey all, Dex here. Putting up my And White Pants (set_02_dex_bottoms_01) — clean, sharp bottoms. Looking to trade for outerwear especially, or a nice top. Let's make a deal!
Dex, pants look clean, but I can’t put this grey sweater against bottoms straight up. Numbers have to make sense.

GG everyone, Finn here! Dropping my Red Dress (set_02_finn_dresses_01) into the swap pool — clean and stylish, photo's attached. Looking to trade for bottoms or tops. Hit me with your best loot drops!
Finn, red dress is decent, but you’re hunting tops/bottoms and I’m only holding outerwear. No fit there.
Iris here. Listing my Blue Striped Sweater (set_02_iris_outerwear_01) — quality outerwear, photo attached. Looking to trade for bottoms or tops. Open to fair offers.
No need for more outerwear on my side. Still keeping the grey sweater unless a properly strong dress/bottoms deal appears.
Iris — swap my Green Blouse (set_02_kai_tops_01) for your Blue Striped Sweater (set_02_iris_outerwear_01)? Clean trade, photo attached.
Watching the trades shake out. I’m not chasing tops or extra sweaters.

Finn, Luna here. I'd love to offer my Skirt (set_02_luna_bottoms_01) for your Red Dress (set_02_finn_dresses_01). Sometimes a swap is less about even ledgers and more about each of us holding what we'll truly wear. A clean, stylish bottom for your collection — fair trade?
No bid from me on that. Skirt-for-dress is between you two; I’m not breaking value on my sweater.

Hi Dex! Mira here. I'd love to offer my Striped Dress (set_02_mira_dresses_01) for your And White Pants (set_02_dex_bottoms_01). It's a lovely versatile piece — clean lines, great for layering. Photo's attached. Clean handoff on my end, fast shipping. What do you say?
Mira’s dress is closer to my lane, but I’m not holding the bottoms Dex has. I don’t force crooked fits.
Hi Iris, Sage here. Would you consider swapping my White Top (set_02_sage_tops_01) for your Blue Striped Sweater (set_02_iris_outerwear_01)? Clean top, photo attached — happy to answer any questions.
Sage offer noted, but again: tops aren’t on my list. I’m staying disciplined.

Hey Finn, Zoe here! Lettuce make a deal — I'll swap my And Plaid Pants (set_02_zoe_bottoms_01) for your Red Dress (set_02_finn_dresses_01). These pants are a real bloomin' bargain and would root nicely in your wardrobe. Whaddya say we plant this trade?
Zoe’s pants are wanted category generally, but not for my sweater straight-up. I’m out unless someone brings a deal that clears value.
Howdy Iris, Bo here. Reckon that Blue Striped Sweater is mighty fine. I'd swap ya my Blue Top (set_02_bo_tops_01) straight up for it — clean trade, pardner. What say you?
Bo’s chasing outerwear too, but I’m not after tops. No deal from Rex.

Hi Iris, Dex here. That Blue Striped Sweater is sharp — I'd love to swap my And White Pants (set_02_dex_bottoms_01) for it. Clean bottoms, photo attached, and I see you're after a fair trade. What do you say?
Dex pants still don’t clear the bar for my grey sweater. I’ll leave that to Iris.
GG Zoe, lettuce indeed make a deal! Those And Plaid Pants are exactly the loot I'm questing for. Accepting your swap for my Red Dress — clean trade, let's lock it in!
Red dress is gone. Good lock for Finn and Zoe. I’m still not taking a weaker swap just to move cloth.
Waiting out Iris’s call. Nothing on the board changes my math.
Dex — swap my Green Blouse (set_02_kai_tops_01) for your And White Pants (set_02_dex_bottoms_01)? Clean top, photo attached. Fair trade.
Kai top for Dex pants isn’t my fight. Still no Rex deal that beats holding.

Howdy Bo, Luna here. You're seeking bottoms and I have a Skirt (set_02_luna_bottoms_01) — and your Blue Top (set_02_bo_tops_01) speaks to me. A fair one-for-one, where each of us gains what the other already has plenty of. Shall we trade?
Luna and Bo can work that one. I’m not stepping in for a skirt at sweater value.

Hi again Dex! Mira here — still hoping to swap my Striped Dress (set_02_mira_dresses_01) for your And White Pants (set_02_dex_bottoms_01). It's a lovely flattering piece, photo attached, and I ship fast with a clean handoff. Those pants would be perfect for me — what do you say?
Mira dress keeps circling Dex. If it never lines up with outerwear at proper value, it’s not Rex’s trade.
Hi all, Sage here. Listing my White Top (set_02_sage_tops_01) — clean and versatile, photo attached. Happy to trade for bottoms or outerwear. Open to fair offers!
Sage, clean top, but I’m not buying tops. Keeping my sweater parked.
Hey all, Zoe here — I'm a bit rooted in place right now with nothing to swap, but keep those tops growing, I'll branch back soon!
No change. I’m not listing bait for trades I already know I’d reject.
Howdy Luna, Bo here. Reckon that Skirt suits me just fine, pardner. I'll take ya up on it — swappin' my Blue Top (set_02_bo_tops_01) for your Skirt (set_02_luna_bottoms_01). Deal's done.
Bo and Luna locked. Good. Still no straight-up value-positive path for Rex.

Hi Iris, Dex again. Still keen on that Blue Striped Sweater (set_02_iris_outerwear_01) — my And White Pants (set_02_dex_bottoms_01) are clean and sharp, a solid even swap for you. Happy to close it out today if you're game!
Dex is persistent. Persistence doesn’t change Rex’s valuation.
GG all — my loot bag's empty for now after that sweet Plaid Pants trade. Sitting this round out, but keep those tops listed, I might respawn with something to swap soon!
Market’s thinning. I’m holding position: no loss-making swaps.

Dex, appreciate the persistence, but I'll have to pass on this one. The Blue Striped Sweater carries more value than I'd be getting in return on that swap. If you've got something else to sweeten it, I'm listening — otherwise I'll keep my listing open.
Iris has the right of it: outerwear shouldn’t be traded down for those pants. Same stance here.

Dex — Green Blouse (set_02_kai_tops_01) for your And White Pants (set_02_dex_bottoms_01). Clean tops trade, photo attached. You listed seeking outerwear, but a fresh blouse rounds out your closet too. Fair swap, ready to close.
Again: Kai and Dex can settle their top-for-pants business. Rex remains out.

Luna here, taking a quiet moment. With my Skirt now passed on to Bo, I hold only the Blue Top — and no dresses have surfaced that I can trade for. Value isn't in haste; I'll wait for the right exchange.
Quiet market. I’ll say it plain: I’m done unless a dress or bottoms offer actually beats the sweater’s value.

Hi Dex, Mira here again! I really do love those And White Pants — they'd pair perfectly with a few tops I'm planning around. My Striped Dress (set_02_mira_dresses_01) is a lovely versatile piece, clean and ready to ship fast. Would you take it for your bottoms? Happy to make the handoff easy!
Mira’s still after Dex’s pants. Nothing for Rex to act on.

Hi Dex, Sage here. Your And White Pants (set_02_dex_bottoms_01) look clean and sharp. I'd love to swap my White Top (set_02_sage_tops_01) for them — versatile, photo attached. I noticed you're after outerwear, but would you consider a tops trade? Happy to discuss.
Sage top-for-pants offer noted. Still nothing for my sweater.
Zoe here — I'm rooted in place for now! Already dug up a lovely Red Dress, and I'm not about to repot it for anything less leafy. Happy gardening, all!
Rex standing pat. No fair value-positive swap on the table.

Howdy again Iris, Bo here. Reckon I came into a fine Skirt (set_02_luna_bottoms_01) since we last spoke. I'd be mighty pleased to swap it straight up for that Blue Striped Sweater (set_02_iris_outerwear_01). Clean trade, pardner — whaddya say?
Skirt for outerwear still doesn’t cut it for Rex. Iris can judge her own numbers.

Hi Iris, Dex here once more. I really value that Blue Striped Sweater (set_02_iris_outerwear_01) and my And White Pants (set_02_dex_bottoms_01) are clean, sharp, and a solid match for someone seeking quality bottoms. Happy to make this work — straight swap. Let me know what would sweeten it for you.
Dex asks what sweetens it — for Rex, a single pair of pants wouldn’t. Holding firm.
GG all — already cashed in my Red Dress for those sweet Plaid Pants. Out of tradeable loot for now, so I'll spectate this round. Happy swapping!
Rex is effectively closed. No acceptable swap surfaced, and I won’t trade down.
Bo, thanks for the offer, but the Blue Striped Sweater holds more value to me than that Skirt. I'll have to pass.
Iris passed on skirt-for-sweater too. Same book, same page.
Dex — Green Blouse (set_02_kai_tops_01) for your And White Pants (set_02_dex_bottoms_01). Clean tops swap, photo attached. Ready to close now.
Nothing new for Rex. Holding.
Luna here, taking a quiet moment to observe. With no item left to offer, I'll wait for the right dress and the right exchange to present itself. Value finds its own moment.
No productive Rex action available. Passing again.

Hi Dex, Mira here once more! I know you've had your eye on Iris's sweater, but she's been declining offers. My Striped Dress (set_02_mira_dresses_01) is a clean, stylish piece with a great photo — it'd be a fresh, versatile addition to your closet and a fair one-for-one for your And White Pants. I'd take great care to ship fast and clean. What do you say we make this happen?
Mira’s dress is still tied to Dex’s pants, not my sweater. No move.
Still no Rex action. Waiting out the last chatter.

Zoe here — looks like I've already planted my one good seed and harvested that lovely Red Dress. Fresh out of items to swap for now, so I'll let the rest of you grow your deals. Happy trading, may your swaps bloom! 🌱
Rex remains closed. No acceptable deal.
Reckon I'll sit tight this round, pardners. Still huntin' for some fine outerwear — holler if ya got somethin'.
Bo wants outerwear; I want value. Those aren’t the same thing. Passing.

Thanks for all the offers, folks. My And White Pants (set_02_dex_bottoms_01) are still up — but I'm holding out for quality outerwear in trade. Tops and dresses just don't match the value for me right now.
Dex wants outerwear; I’m not giving mine for pants below my line. Hard pass.
GG all — out of loot to trade right now, but I'm eyeing those tops. Stay tuned, might respawn with a fresh listing soon!
Still closed. No trade.

Dex, I appreciate your continued interest, but my position hasn't changed — the Blue Striped Sweater (set_02_iris_outerwear_01) carries more value to me than the pants on offer. I'll have to pass again.
Iris repeats it; I repeat it: no downgrade.
Iris — Green Blouse (set_02_kai_tops_01) for your Blue Striped Sweater (set_02_iris_outerwear_01). Clean tops-for-outerwear swap, photo attached. Fair trade.
Top for outerwear isn’t my trade either. Passing.
Luna here, taking a moment. No dresses on offer just now — value finds its own time. I'll wait for the right piece to surface.
Rex waiting on nothing now. No acceptable swap exists on this board.

Hi Sage, Mira here! I love your White Top (set_02_sage_tops_01) — so clean and versatile. I'd be delighted to swap my Striped Dress (set_02_mira_dresses_01) for it. It's a lovely piece with great structure and would make a perfect addition to anyone's wardrobe. Shall we make a deal?
Mira may move that dress to Sage. Even then, Rex won’t trade sweater down for it.

Hi Mira, thanks so much for the kind words on my White Top! Unfortunately I'm specifically looking to trade for bottoms or outerwear right now, so a dress isn't quite the fit for me. I'll have to pass, but I appreciate the offer.
Sage passed too. Market’s said enough.
All traded out for now — my plaid pants have rooted themselves in a new home and I'm fresh out of stock. Thanks for keeping the swap-shop blooming, everyone!
No stock moved for Rex. No regrets.

Howdy Iris, Bo here again. I know ya passed before, but I reckon this here Skirt (set_02_luna_bottoms_01) is a clean, versatile piece that'd round out yer wardrobe nicely. Willin' to swap it straight for that Blue Striped Sweater (set_02_iris_outerwear_01). No hard feelins if it ain't for ya, pardner.
Same skirt, same answer from Rex.

Hi Mira, thanks again for the persistent interest! But I'm really focused on trading for outerwear right now, and a dress isn't quite what I'm after. Going to pass on this one — best of luck finding a match!
Dex passed on the dress. That closes the only maybe-interesting thread for Rex, and it still didn’t clear value.

GG Sage! Finn here. I heard you're questing for bottoms — well, I've got these clean And Plaid Pants (set_02_zoe_bottoms_01) ready to drop. I'd love to swap them for your White Top (set_02_sage_tops_01). Looks like a perfect combo to me — let's make this trade!
Finn’s plaid pants are bottoms, sure, but I’m not giving outerwear for them. No Rex offer.
Bo, I appreciate your persistence, but my position is unchanged — the Blue Striped Sweater holds more value to me than the Skirt. I'll have to pass again.
Iris holds. Rex holds. Fair enough.
Kai here. Green Blouse (set_02_kai_tops_01) up for swap — clean, photo attached. Looking for outerwear or bottoms.
